channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Whoop has LeBron – now it wants your mom
item.description: Whoop founder Will Ahmed has spent 14 years building a health wearable beloved by elite athletes, and is now racing Oura — and the FDA, and the limits of consumer medicine — to turn it into something that could one day save your life.

item.title: These are my top 5 Pokémon games on Nintendo Switch 2 — including a controversial entry, and one that you may have forgotten
item.description: Of all the Pokémon games that are playable on Switch 2, these are the five best — at least in my opinion.
